title: Newsletter Sendout
description: Represents a single newsletter distribution event. Referenced by the newsletter extension to describe upcoming or past sendouts with their scheduling, volume, and available placements.

scheduled_at.description: Scheduled send time in ISO 8601 format

expected_volume.description: Expected number of emails to be sent in this sendout

edition.description: Human-readable edition label (e.g., 'Vol. 12, Issue 48' or '2026-02-20 Morning')

sendout_status.description: Current lifecycle status of this sendout

available_placement_ids.description: Placement IDs that still have available inventory in this sendout. Fully sold placements are omitted.

available_impressions.description: Number of ad impressions available for external booking in this sendout. May be less than expected_volume when the publisher has reserved part of the inventory for internal or direct-sold campaigns. If omitted, all impressions from expected_volume are available.
